items.title: Largest US Grid Saw Demand Hit Record High Thursday on Heat
items.desc: Power demand on the largest US grid surged to a record on Thursday as temperatures soared above 100F (38C) across much of the mid-Atlantic, underscoring the strain on an electricity system already struggling to cope with a data-center boom.
